endpoints.name: Create an alert for a thing. A thing must be locked before an alert can be set.
endpoints.description: Create an alert for a thing. A thing must be locked before an alert can be set.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CONDITION}} with a real condition. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing. Replace {{WHO}} with a real who.

endpoints.name: Get the alert attached to a thing.
endpoints.description: Get the alert attached to a thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Read the last 5 cached dweets for a thing.
endpoints.description: Read the last 5 cached dweets for a thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Read the latest dweet for a thing.
endpoints.description: Read the latest dweet for a thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Read all the saved alerts for a thing from long term storage.  You can query a maximum of 1 day per request and a granularly of 1 hour.
endpoints.description: Read all the saved alerts for a thing from long term storage.  You can query a maximum of 1 day per request and a granularly of 1 hour.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Read all the saved dweets for a thing from long term storage.  You can query a maximum of 1 day per request and a granularly of 1 hour.
endpoints.description: Read all the saved dweets for a thing from long term storage.  You can query a maximum of 1 day per request and a granularly of 1 hour.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Listen for dweets from a thing.
endpoints.description:
Sorry, this function uses HTTP chunked responses and cannot be tested here. Try something like: 
curl --raw https://dweet.io/listen/for/dweets/from/{thing}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Reserve and lock a thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Remove an alert for a thing.
endpoints.description: Remove an alert for a thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.

endpoints.name: Remove a lock from thing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCK}} with a real lock.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THING}} with a real thing.
